name: Sloppy Joes W/Homemade Sloppy Joe Seasoning Mix
recipeIngredient: 1 packet homemade sloppy joe seasoning mix
recipeInstructions:
1. Brown the ground beef in a skillet over medium-high heat. Drain any excess grease.
2. Add the homemade sloppy joe seasoning mix, water, and tomato sauce to the skillet. Bring the mixture to a boil.
3. Reduce the heat and let it simmer for 10 minutes, stirring occasionally.
4. Serve the meat mixture on toasted hamburger buns.
Makes 6 sandwiches.
